hunter_likelihood_reason: Main evidence shows general worker dispatch (一般労働者派遣), telecom direct sales, real estate, and disability welfare -- dispatch/temp staffing exclusion signal
notes: Official website wagao.co.jp confirmed with matching address (北海道札幌市中央区南2条西8丁目3番1号 大光ビル5F) and phone (011-206-0212). No email published.
